members.name: AddMessage
members.signature: public void AddMessage(int type, String category, String message)
members.summary: Adds a message to the export log that will be displayed when exporting ends.

members.name: ClearMessages
members.signature: public void ClearMessages()
members.summary: Clears the export log.

members.name: CreatePreset
members.signature: public EditorExportPreset CreatePreset()
members.summary: Create a new preset for this platform.

members.name: ExportPack
members.signature: public int ExportPack(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Creates a PCK archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset].

members.name: ExportPackPatch
members.signature: public int ExportPackPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, PackedStringArray patches, int flags)
members.summary: Creates a patch PCK archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset], containing only the files that have changed since the last patch. [b]Note:[/b] [param patches] is an optional override of the set of patches defined in the export preset. When empty the patches defined in the export preset will be used instead.

members.name: ExportProject
members.signature: public int ExportProject(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags, bool notify)
members.summary: Creates a full project at [param path] for the specified [param preset]. If [param notify] is [code]true[/code], plugins using [method EditorExportPlugin._export_begin] will be called during the process.

members.name: ExportProjectFiles
members.signature: public int ExportProjectFiles(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, Callable saveCb, Callable sharedCb)
members.summary: Exports project files for the specified preset. This method can be used to implement custom export format, other than PCK and ZIP. One of the callbacks is called for each exported file. [param save_cb] is called for all exported files and have the following arguments: [code]file_path: String[/code], [code]file_data: PackedByteArray[/code], [code]file_index: int[/code], [code]file_count: int[/code], [code]encryption_include_filters: PackedStringArray[/code], [code]encryption_exclude_filters: PackedStringArray[/code], [code]encryption_key: PackedByteArray[/code]. [param shared_cb] is called for exported native shared/static libraries and have the following arguments: [code]file_path: String[/code], [code]tags: PackedStringArray[/code], [code]target_folder: String[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]file_index[/code] and [code]file_count[/code] are intended for progress tracking only and aren't necessarily unique and precise.

members.name: ExportZip
members.signature: public int ExportZip(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Create a ZIP archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset].

members.name: ExportZipPatch
members.signature: public int ExportZipPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, PackedStringArray patches, int flags)
members.summary: Create a patch ZIP archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset], containing only the files that have changed since the last patch. [b]Note:[/b] [param patches] is an optional override of the set of patches defined in the export preset. When empty the patches defined in the export preset will be used instead.

members.name: FindExportTemplate
members.signature: public Dictionary FindExportTemplate(String templateFileName)
members.summary: Locates export template for the platform, and returns [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code]path: String[/code] and [code]error: String[/code]. This method is provided for convenience and custom export platforms aren't required to use it or keep export templates stored in the same way official templates are.

members.name: GenExportFlags
members.signature: public PackedStringArray GenExportFlags(int flags)
members.summary: Generates array of command line arguments for the default export templates for the debug flags and editor settings.

members.name: GetCurrentPresets
members.signature: public Array GetCurrentPresets()
members.summary: Returns array of [EditorExportPreset]s for this platform.

members.name: GetForcedExportFiles
members.signature: public PackedStringArray GetForcedExportFiles(EditorExportPreset preset)
members.summary: Returns array of core file names that always should be exported regardless of preset config.

members.name: GetInternalExportFiles
members.signature: public Dictionary GetInternalExportFiles(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug)
members.summary: Returns additional files that should always be exported regardless of preset configuration, and are not part of the project source. The returned [Dictionary] contains filename keys ([String]) and their corresponding raw data ([PackedByteArray]).

members.name: GetMessageCategory
members.signature: public String GetMessageCategory(int index)
members.summary: Returns the message category for the message with the given [param index].

members.name: GetMessageCount
members.signature: public int GetMessageCount()
members.summary: Returns the number of messages in the export log.

members.name: GetMessageText
members.signature: public String GetMessageText(int index)
members.summary: Returns the text for the message with the given [param index].

members.name: GetMessageType
members.signature: public int GetMessageType(int index)
members.summary: Returns the type for the message with the given [param index].

members.name: GetOsName
members.signature: public String GetOsName()
members.summary: Returns the name of the export operating system handled by this [EditorExportPlatform] class, as a friendly string. Possible return values are [code]Windows[/code], [code]Linux[/code], [code]macOS[/code], [code]Android[/code], [code]iOS[/code], and [code]Web[/code].

members.name: GetWorstMessageType
members.signature: public int GetWorstMessageType()
members.summary: Returns most severe message type currently present in the export log.

members.name: SavePack
members.signature: public Dictionary SavePack(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, bool embed)
members.summary: Saves PCK archive and returns [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code]result: Error[/code], [code]so_files: Array[/code] (array of the shared/static objects which contains dictionaries with the following keys: [code]path: String[/code], [code]tags: PackedStringArray[/code], and [code]target_folder: String[/code]). If [param embed] is [code]true[/code], PCK content is appended to the end of [param path] file and return [Dictionary] additionally include following keys: [code]embedded_start: int[/code] (embedded PCK offset) and [code]embedded_size: int[/code] (embedded PCK size).

members.name: SavePackPatch
members.signature: public Dictionary SavePackPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path)
members.summary: Saves patch PCK archive and returns [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code]result: Error[/code], [code]so_files: Array[/code] (array of the shared/static objects which contains dictionaries with the following keys: [code]path: String[/code], [code]tags: PackedStringArray[/code], and [code]target_folder: String[/code]).

members.name: SaveZip
members.signature: public Dictionary SaveZip(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path)
members.summary: Saves ZIP archive and returns [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code]result: Error[/code], [code]so_files: Array[/code] (array of the shared/static objects which contains dictionaries with the following keys: [code]path: String[/code], [code]tags: PackedStringArray[/code], and [code]target_folder: String[/code]).

members.name: SaveZipPatch
members.signature: public Dictionary SaveZipPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path)
members.summary: Saves patch ZIP archive and returns [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code]result: Error[/code], [code]so_files: Array[/code] (array of the shared/static objects which contains dictionaries with the following keys: [code]path: String[/code], [code]tags: PackedStringArray[/code], and [code]target_folder: String[/code]).

members.name: SshPushToRemote
members.signature: public int SshPushToRemote(String host, String port, PackedStringArray scpArgs, String srcFile, String dstFile)
members.summary: Uploads specified file over SCP protocol to the remote host.

members.name: SshRunOnRemote
members.signature: public int SshRunOnRemote(String host, String port, PackedStringArray sshArg, String cmdArgs, Array output, int portFwd)
members.summary: Executes specified command on the remote host via SSH protocol and returns command output in the [param output].

members.name: SshRunOnRemoteNoWait
members.signature: public int SshRunOnRemoteNoWait(String host, String port, PackedStringArray sshArgs, String cmdArgs, int portFwd)
members.summary: Executes specified command on the remote host via SSH protocol and returns process ID (on the remote host) without waiting for command to finish.

values.name: DEBUG_FLAG_DUMB_CLIENT
values.summary: Flag is set if the remotely debugged project is expected to use the remote file system. If set, [method gen_export_flags] will append [code]--remote-fs[/code] and [code]--remote-fs-password[/code] (if [member EditorSettings.filesystem/file_server/password] is defined) command line arguments to the returned list.

values.name: DEBUG_FLAG_REMOTE_DEBUG
values.summary: Flag is set if remote debug is enabled. If set, [method gen_export_flags] will append [code]--remote-debug[/code] and [code]--breakpoints[/code] (if breakpoints are selected in the script editor or added by the plugin) command line arguments to the returned list.

values.name: DEBUG_FLAG_REMOTE_DEBUG_LOCALHOST
values.summary: Flag is set if remotely debugged project is running on the localhost. If set, [method gen_export_flags] will use [code]localhost[/code] instead of [member EditorSettings.network/debug/remote_host] as remote debugger host.

values.name: DEBUG_FLAG_VIEW_COLLISIONS
values.summary: Flag is set if the "Visible Collision Shapes" remote debug option is enabled. If set, [method gen_export_flags] will append the [code]--debug-collisions[/code] command line argument to the returned list.

values.name: DEBUG_FLAG_VIEW_NAVIGATION
values.summary: Flag is set if the "Visible Navigation" remote debug option is enabled. If set, [method gen_export_flags] will append the [code]--debug-navigation[/code] command line argument to the returned list.

values.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_ERROR
values.summary: Message type for error messages that must be addressed and fail the export.

values.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_INFO
values.summary: Message type for informational messages that have no effect on the export.

values.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_NONE
values.summary: Invalid message type used as the default value when no type is specified.

values.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_WARNING
values.summary: Message type for warning messages that should be addressed but still allow to complete the export.

constants.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_NONE
constants.summary: Invalid message type used as the default value when no type is specified.

constants.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_INFO
constants.summary: Message type for informational messages that have no effect on the export.

constants.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_WARNING
constants.summary: Message type for warning messages that should be addressed but still allow to complete the export.

constants.name: EXPORT_MESSAGE_ERROR
constants.summary: Message type for error messages that must be addressed and fail the export.
